summary: Tested 'Edit Units and Conversion Factors' feature. All 10 backend tests passed. UI verified: Units Manager panel visible, custom unit CRUD works, unit edit shows propagation warning, conversion factor calculator visible with real-time cost recalculation.
passed_tests: Backend: Create custom unit with name and abbreviation
Backend: List custom units returns array
Backend: Custom unit can be used in ingredient creation
Backend: Edit unit abbreviation propagates to linked ingredients (unit and purchase_unit fields)
Backend: Delete unit blocked when in use by ingredients
Backend: Delete unused unit succeeds
Backend: Duplicate unit name/abbreviation prevented
Backend: Conversion factor edit creates audit log
Backend: GET /ingredients/{id}/affected-recipes returns count and recipe list
Backend: Dispatch unit cost auto-calculated (avg_cost / conversion_factor)
Frontend: 'Gestionar Unidades' button visible in Insumos tab
Frontend: 'Nueva Unidad' button opens unit dialog
Frontend: Unit dialog has fields for Nombre, Abreviatura, Categoría
Frontend: Custom unit appears in ingredient dropdown selectors
Frontend: Edit unit dialog shows propagation warning with bullet points
Frontend: 'Calculadora de Factor de Conversión' section visible in ingredient dialog
Frontend: Conversion factor fields all editable: Unidad de Compra, Cantidad de Compra, Equivalencia en Despacho, Factor de Conversión
Frontend: 'Edición libre permitida' text displayed under Factor de Conversión
Frontend: Cost preview (Costo por unidad) recalculates in real-time
Frontend: Cost formula explanation shown: '= RD$ X (costo compra) ÷ Y (factor)'
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test units (TEST_Saco, TEST_Edit_Unit, etc.) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unit definitions CRUD fully working. Key endpoints: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/unit-definitions. PUT propagates abbreviation changes to ingredients.unit and ingredients.purchase_unit. Conversion factor calculator in ingredient dialog auto-calculates factor and dispatch_unit_cost. Historial button appears in edit mode (requires ingredient to have audit log history).

unit_propagation.description: When unit abbreviation is edited, it propagates to all ingredients using that unit

fields.dispatch_quantity: Numeric input, equivalence in dispatch unit
fields.conversion_factor: Auto-calculated or manually editable (Edición libre permitida)

audit_history.note: Historial button shows in edit mode when ingredient has audit logs

affected_recipes_notification.ui_location: Shows amber warning in ingredient dialog when editing

mocked_apis.status: No APIs are mocked - all endpoints are fully functional
